name: Grocy
description: Track groceries, chores, recipes, and household tasks
compose:
name: slashnode-grocy
services:
  server:
    image: linuxserver/grocy:4.6.0
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
      TZ: Etc/UTC
      GROCY_BASE_URL: /
    volumes:
      - server_data-config:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:9283:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-grocy_server_data-config
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (grocy). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://grocy.info/. Default login — user: "admin", password: "admin". ⚠️ SECURITY: ships a default password ("admin") — must be changed on first login.
